questions.enonce: What do you need to write to apply for a job?
A 'part-time' job means you work all day, every day.
An {{1}} (entretien) is a meeting between an employer and a candidate.

questions.question: Match the job with its description.

pairs.right: Helps sick people in a hospital
Designs and builds machines or bridges
Serves food and drinks in a restaurant

options: The money you earn every month for your work
